title: Panjab University Date Sheet 2025 @ puchd.ac.in

detail.title: Panjab University Date Sheet 2025 @ puchd.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of Panjab University have released the Panjab University Date Sheet 2025 for B.A. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: Panjab University Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Panjab University has released the B.A. For further updates on Panjab University, candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: Important Details Panjab University Date Sheet 2025
How to Download the Panjab University Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Panjab University Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

rows: Change of subject code in the date sheet of Bachelor of Arts /Science 3rd Semester (Non –Nep): Change of subject code in the date sheet of Bachelor of Arts /Science 3rd Semester (Non –Nep)
Bachelor of Arts - 1ST Semester (Full Subjects) Examination only for Private and CDOE: Bachelor of Arts - 1ST Semester (Full Subjects) Examination only for Private and CDOE
